title: Fragmented by Anoosh
description: This mod introduces a horrifying new experience to your Minecraft nights!
body:
This mod introduces a horrifying new experience to your Minecraft nights!

🌑 At night, a unique hostile creature spawns: its body parts are completely separated — 🪓 head, arms, legs, and torso all move independently, relentlessly chasing the player. Wherever the head goes, the rest follow, making it chaotic and unpredictable.

💀 Your goal is to defeat and collect all of its body parts. Once you have them all, place them in a Crafting Table to craft the 🥚 Boss Spawn Egg.

🔥 The boss form of this creature appears fully assembled and is far stronger and tankier, posing a serious challenge even for experienced players.

🩸 Upon defeating the boss, it drops its Severed Hand 🖐️, a powerful weapon with extremely high attack damage — a worthy reward for your efforts.

⚒️ Note: This mod requires 'Geckolib 1.20.1'  to work properly. Make sure to install it as a dependency!
